## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Security fix

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes (no errors)
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes (no type errors)
- [ ] Tested in browser manually
- [ ] Relevant edge cases considered

## Database / Edge Functions

- [ ] No database changes (skip below)
- [ ] Migration file added to `supabase/migrations/`
- [ ] Migration is backwards-compatible (no breaking schema changes)
- [ ] Edge function(s) redeployed if changed

## Checklist

- [ ] Version bumped in `lib/version.ts`
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated
- [ ] CLAUDE.md build status updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets or API keys in the diff
- [ ] All user-facing strings are XSS-safe (use `esc()` / React encoding)
